name: prisma
description: Next-generation ORM for Node.js and TypeScript

options.name: --datasource-provider
options.description: Define the datasource provider (e.g. postgresql, mysql, sqlite)

options.name: --url
options.description: Define a custom datasource url

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch the Prisma schema and rerun after a change

subcommands.name: db push
subcommands.description: Push the state from your Prisma schema to your database

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

options.name: --force-reset
options.description: Force a reset of the database before push

options.name: --skip-generate
options.description: Skip generating artifacts (e.g. Prisma Client)

options.name: --accept-data-loss
options.description: Ignore data loss warnings

subcommands.name: db pull
subcommands.description: Pull the schema from an existing database, updating the Prisma schema

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the overwrite of manual changes made to schema

options.name: --print
options.description: Print the introspected schema to stdout

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

subcommands.name: migrate dev
subcommands.description: Create a migration from changes in Prisma schema, apply it to the database, trigger generators

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

options.name: --name
options.description: Name the migration

options.name: --create-only
options.description: Create a new migration but do not apply it

subcommands.name: migrate deploy
subcommands.description: Apply pending migrations to the database

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

subcommands.name: migrate reset
subcommands.description: Reset your database and apply all migrations, all data will be lost

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

options.name: --force
options.description: Skip the confirmation prompt

subcommands.name: studio
subcommands.description: Browse your data with Prisma Studio

options.name: --schema
options.description: Custom path to your Prisma schema

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to start Studio on

options.name: --browser
options.description: Browser to open Studio in
